summary: A lightly-edited recording of Markwayne Mullin being sworn in as DHS Secretary in the Oval Office, with Trump speaking and the oath administered, captioned with a White House header banner and subtitles. It is raw ceremony/speech footage with text overlay and no music or cinematic spectacle.
notable_text: On-screen: 'Markwayne Mullin Officially Sworn In as DHS Secretary' / 'The WHITE HOUSE'.
